title: Becalm
description:
In this relaxing first person voyage you'll sail towards the sunset through magical waters in a very special boat. You won't have to worry about steering, logistics, missing crewmembers, capsizing or even pirates. It's a trip for you to sit back and... becalm!

• Bright and dreamy watercolor aesthetics that bring to life multiple biomes.

• An awesome synthesizer ensemble cascading through field recorded maritime soundscapes.

• Every time you play it'll randomly select a journey for you.

• Choose between a five minute journey or endless mode.

• Relax.

• Use your mouse to look around.

• Space to switch journey.

• Press Esc to Quit, tho it closes on its own after 5 minutes.

Music, Art and Programming by @colorfiction
Special thanks to Eric Lorenz for field recording many of the ocean and boat soundscapes!
description_short: Fancy a relaxing drift through magical waters? Enjoy this seafaring voyage in search of the sunset!
